items.title: VI Live: Ihattaren zet NEC op achterstand
items.summary: Zaterdag belooft een fraaie voetbaldag te worden. Er staan drie potjes in de Eredivisie op het programma, waarvan die van PSV een eigen liveblog heeft. In het buitenland komen onder meer Liverpool, Manchester City en Barcelona in actie, terwijl in Duitsland Der Klassiker wordt gespeeld. Mis niets met VI Live.

items.title: Kompany op titelkoers: 'Dit was geweldige reclame voor de Bundesliga'
items.summary: Bayern München-trainer Vincent Kompany heeft zaterdag genoten van de Bundesliga-kraker tussen Bayern München en Borussia Dortmund . Der Rekordmeister zette met een late zege in het Signal Iduna Park een belangrijke stap richting de landstitel.

items.title: Scorende Zeefuik krijgt lof: 'Speelde zoals Boadu had moeten spelen'
items.summary: Heracles-spits Lequincio Zeefuik kreeg ondanks de nederlaag tegen PSV van alle kanten lof. Niet alleen om zijn wereldgoal, maar ook om zijn sterke spel.

items.title: Heracles hoopte op stunt tegen PSV: 'Dan kon je misschien nog een puntje pakken'
items.summary: De druk op rode lantaarndrager Heracles neemt met de week toe. De ploeg van Ernest Faber hoopte zaterdag een of meerdere punten te sprokkelen tegen PSV, maar kwam van een koude kermis thuis. Doelman Remko Pasveer weet dat de tijd begint te dringen, maar blijft positief. 'Zo simpel is het.'

items.title: Bayern edge thrilling Klassiker to go 11 pts clear
items.summary: A Joshua Kimmich volley late on complimented Harry Kane's brace in the Der Klassiker on Saturday as Bayern Munich stretched their lead at the top of the Bundesliga further.

items.title: Semenyo scores only goal as City cut Arsenal lead
items.summary: Antoine Semenyo netted the only goal of the game as Manchester City beat Leeds United 1-0 on Saturday to cut Arsenal's Premier League lead to two points.

items.title: Barça's Yamal after 1st hat trick: I'm happy again
items.summary: Lamine Yamal has revealed he has not felt good this season but says he is finally enjoying football again after scoring the first hat trick of his career

items.title: 'Exceptional' Wrexham's promotion push rolls on
items.summary: Phil Parkinson praised the tenacity of his Wrexham side as they maintained their fine away record in the Championship with a 1-0 success at Charlton.

items.title: Lukaku in tears after 1st goal since father's death
items.summary: An emotional Romelu Lukaku fought back tears after scoring his first goal of a season that has brought both extreme professional and personal struggles.

items.title: Gemengde gevoelens bij Bosz die prachtgoal Zeefuik miste: 'Moest naar de wc'
items.summary: PSV-trainer Peter Bosz stond na de overwinning op Heracles Almelo met gemengde gevoelens voor de camera van ESPN. Zijn ploeg speelde een ijzersterke eerste en een dramatische tweede helft.

items.title: Late Brentford winner thwarts spirited Burnley comeback
items.summary: Brentford hold on as Burnley have their three-goal comeback against squashed by Mikel Damsgaard's injury-time winner, with Ashley Barnes' last gasp equaliser ruled out.

items.title: Semenyo makes the difference as Man City beat Leeds
items.summary: Antoine Semenyo's goal for Man City moments before half-time is enough to beat Leeds United and close in on leaders Arsenal in the Premier League.

items.title: Pickford and Barry heroics earn Everton late win at Newcastle
items.summary: Thierno Barry responds to Newcastle's late equaliser with a goal of his own to see Everton beat Newcastle 3-2.

items.title: Spring in Sesko’s step is thanks to Carrick scrapping Amorim’s tactical stranglehold | Jonathan Wilson
items.summary: The starkest improvement under the interim manager has been the Slovenian supersub’s attacking potency Benjamin Sesko’s career at Manchester United breaks into two distinct periods. In the first, he played 1,404 minutes of football and scored two goals. In the second, he has played 274 minutes and scored six goals: 702 minutes per goal and then 45 minutes 40 seconds per goal. There’s a very obvious explanation. On 4 January, Sesko toiled in a 1-1 draw at Leeds. He didn’t manage a shot on target. He completed only 76% of his passes. He didn’t attempt a dribble but still lost possession five times. He was caught offside twice. On 5 January, Ruben Amorim was sacked. Continue reading...

items.title: Liverpool score five in dominant win over West Ham
items.summary: Liverpool put five past West Ham United in a dominant performance that moves them up to fifth in the Premier League table.

items.title: Evanilson goal extends Bournemouth unbeaten run
items.summary: Bournemouth's unbeaten run extends to eight Premier League games after coming from behind to draw 1-1 with Sunderland.

items.title: Lowry takes joint lead of Cognizant Classic with Smotherman
items.summary: Shane Lowry moved into a share of the lead after the third round of the Cognizant Classic with a bogey-free, eight-under round of 63.

items.title: Man City beat Leeds to close gap on league leaders Arsenal
items.summary: FREE TO WATCH: Highlights from Leeds United’s match against Manchester City in the Premier League.

items.title: Manchester City close gap to two points at top after Semenyo sinks Leeds
items.summary: For those wondering if Manchester City are over reliant on Erling Haaland, they offered a riposte at Leeds. It was neither a fluid nor entertaining victory but importantly it closed the gap at the top to two points, increasing the pressure on Arsenal in the process. It helps that when the league’s top scorer is absent, City can rely on the third man in the charts. Antoine Semenyo scored his 14th of the season on a difficult night for Pep Guardiola’s side, making the full-time euphoria well deserved after what felt like a significant win. A number of City players sunk to the turf once the whistle went, having called on all their reserves to get over the line. Continue reading...

items.title: Semenyo fires City ahead right on the stroke of half-time!
items.summary: Semenyo fires Manchester City ahead right on the stroke of half-time against Leeds in the Premier League.
